descriptor: Bright pop anthem with a sunrise commute feel and fast, uplifting hooks.
evidence: Works well when the listener wants upbeat pop energy without harsh distortion.
Strong fit for morning momentum, quick confidence boosts, and happy city-walk moments.

descriptor: Soft lofi groove built for late-night coding, studying, and quiet concentration.
evidence: Low live energy and mellow pacing make it reliable background music for sustained focus.
The chill and focused profile supports writing, coding, and reading without pulling attention away.

descriptor: Driven rock track made for intense workouts, big pushes, and dramatic momentum.
evidence: Near-maximum energy and a defiant mood make it a strong match for high-adrenaline requests.
Best when the user wants something forceful, loud, and action-oriented.

descriptor: Rainy-day lofi instrumental for reading, library sessions, and low-stress focus.
evidence: High acousticness and very low energy make it one of the safest options for quiet background listening.
Its study-friendly mood works best when the listener wants concentration instead of stimulation.

descriptor: Explosive pop workout song designed for the gym, fast runs, and motivational bursts.
evidence: Very high energy plus low acousticness make it ideal for intense movement and high-tempo routines.
The track is strongest when a user asks for hype, motivation, or a punchy pop boost.

descriptor: Ambient drift for meditation, stargazing, journaling, and slow reflective listening.
evidence: Extremely high instrumentalness and low live energy support calm, immersive background use.
Best for requests centered on stillness, reflection, or spacious late-night atmosphere.

descriptor: Warm jazz café track for reading, conversation, and relaxed weekend mornings.
evidence: Its mellow energy and smoky warmth make it a natural fit for laid-back social or solo time.
Useful when the listener wants something acoustic, human, and gently nostalgic.

descriptor: Retro synthwave for solo night drives, neon city lights, and moody movement.
evidence: The retro mood and steady driving pulse make it a strong late-night travel track.
It fits best when the request mixes motion, moodiness, and cinematic atmosphere.

descriptor: Steady lofi loop for coding sprints, planning blocks, and calm concentration.
evidence: The focused tag and restrained energy keep it useful during heads-down work.
A good fit when the listener wants something more structured than dreamy ambient music.

descriptor: Shimmering indie-pop song for rooftop hangs, city walks, and upbeat evenings.
evidence: Balances happy energy with a softer romantic glow, making it more flexible than pure gym-pop.
A strong choice when the listener wants pop brightness with a little emotional warmth.

descriptor: Confident hip hop pick for creative sprints, solo commutes, and lyrical momentum.
evidence: High lyrical density makes it better for energized creative work than for low-distraction study.
Useful when the request asks for swagger, verbal flow, or focused self-belief.

descriptor: Elegant classical piece for reflection, reading, ceremonies, and quiet reset moments.
evidence: Very low energy and near-total instrumentalness make it the catalog's clearest classical calm option.
Best when the user wants beauty, stillness, or a refined acoustic atmosphere.

descriptor: Open-road country track for road trips, sunny drives, and honest uplifting singalongs.
evidence: Moderate energy and an uplifting mood make it a dependable travel companion.
Best for requests that ask for warmth, movement, and clear-hearted optimism.

descriptor: Festival-ready EDM banger for dance floors, high-intensity training, and party peaks.
evidence: Its euphoric tags and maximum live-energy feel make it one of the strongest party or cardio songs here.
Best when the request explicitly wants dance energy, celebration, or nonstop motion.

descriptor: Acoustic folk story-song for journaling, nostalgia, campfire moods, and slow mornings.
evidence: High acousticness plus storytelling warmth make it a strong match for reflective, human-scale listening.
It fits especially well when the listener asks for nostalgia, comfort, or quiet emotional detail.

descriptor: Smooth R&B track for late-night unwinding, slow dancing, and intimate evening playlists.
evidence: Balanced energy and romantic warmth make it a flexible pick for evening mood-setting.
A strong fit when the user wants something polished, emotional, and not too aggressive.

descriptor: Playful Latin dance track for celebrations, travel energy, and upbeat movement.
evidence: High danceability and festive tags make it a reliable option when the request wants joy and motion.
Best for social playlists, celebration energy, or bright movement without the intensity of metal.

descriptor: Heavy metal blast for maximum adrenaline, lifting sessions, and aggressive release.
evidence: The highest energy profile in the catalog makes it best for all-out intensity rather than balanced listening.
Useful when the request specifically wants something raw, aggressive, and physically forceful.
